heading: Rule of construction
label: 678 Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this part shall be construed as precluding State courts from exercising their discretion to protect the health and safety of children in individual cases, including cases other than those described in .section 671(a)(15)(D) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 678, , as added , , , excluded from AFDC unit child for whom foster care maintenance payments are made, prior to repeal by , (c), , , applicable with respect to benefits for months beginning on or after the first day of the sixth calendar month following November 1990.act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title IV, § 478Pub.
